caption: In a clinical setting, a group of people are engaged in a medical simulation. Initially, two individuals are seated at a table, one wearing a face mask and a dark shirt, and another in blue scrubs, appearing to review paperwork. The scene then transitions to a simulated medical emergency where several people, including individuals in scrubs and dark clothing, are gathered around a patient lying on a gurney. One person is positioned over the patient, performing a medical procedure. In the background, medical equipment and supplies are visible on shelves. Each frame contains a logo in the bottom right corner that reads "Sim Week". In the final sequence, text appears at the bottom of the screen stating "Trauma resuscitation". The progression shows a shift from a preparatory planning phase to an active, high-pressure clinical scenario.
